title: Asana
description: Metadata for one asana in the curated repository. Lives alongside its image as content/asanas/<slug>/meta.json.

slug.description: URL/filename-safe id. Must match the containing folder name.

sanskritName.description: Name in Sanskrit, e.g. "Adho Mukha Svanasana".

otherNames.description: Any additional names or spellings this asana is known by.

series.description: Predefined series this asana belongs to, e.g. "suria namaskar A", "ashtanga primary series".

durationSeconds.description: Default hold duration in seconds, used for class duration calculations.

assists.description: Physical assists a teacher can offer for this asana, e.g. "push downward on the lumbar zone".

image.description: Filename of the image in this asana's folder, e.g. "image.jpeg".

verified.description: False for draft/auto-generated entries. Set true once a teacher has reviewed and confirmed the metadata.

description.description: Longer explanatory text about the pose - origin of the name, what it does, how it feels. Shown to teachers/students, distinct from "notes".

notes.description: Free-text notes for curators, e.g. provenance of the entry or caveats - not shown to end users.
